rows.speaker: B
rows.english: No, it is a rented house

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: No, it is not so big.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What is the rent of your house ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: It is a very beautiful house.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Are the fruits of that tree very sweet ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: They are my elder brother's children.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: How many elder brothers do you have ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: One elder brother, two younger sisters.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Are all those children of the same person ?

rows.roman: aa muuru hudugaru, obba hudugi annana makkalu
rows.english: Those three boys and a girl are elder brother's children.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: They are my younger sister's children.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: How many children do you have ?
